info.name: Announcement Center
info.description: This application enables admins to notify users about e.g. upcoming maintenance windows or changed features. Notifications are sent via Activity mails, the notification bell in the WebUI and ownCloud clients display them as well. This is a PHP 8.4 fork maintained by BW-Tech GmbH for owncloud.online.
info.author: Joas Schilling, modified by BW-Tech GmbH
